response: the parametric equations describe an ellipsoid with semi-axes a and b where the surface area formula involves elliptic integrals unless a equals b in which case it becomes a sphere with area 4πa² setting 4πa² to 1000 yields a value for a approximately 8.92 if we assume a equals b for solvability without complex integrals then a and b are both 8.92 units the conductivity function simplifies to c times the squared radius on the surface which for a sphere is constant c a² integrating this over the area 4πa² gives total conductivity as 4πa⁴c substituting c as 0.5 and a as 8.92 results in a total conductivity value of approximately 2251 units
